Class Dog

java.lang.Object
shelter.domain.Animal
shelter.domain.Dog
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Animal>
public class Dog extends Animal
Represents a dog available for adoption at a shelter. In addition to the base Animal attributes, a dog has a physical size classification and a neutered status, both of which can affect matching recommendations.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    Dog.Size
    Represents the physical size of a dog.

  • Constructor Details

    • Dog

      public Dog(String id, String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, boolean vaccinated, String adopterId, String shelterId, Dog.Size size, boolean neutered)
      Reconstruction constructor for deserializing a Dog from persistent storage. This constructor preserves the original id and all fields including species-specific attributes, allowing exact round-trip restore from CSV data.
      Parameters:
      id - the pre-existing unique identifier; must not be null or blank
      name - the dog's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the dog's breed; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the dog's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the dog's activity level; must not be null
      vaccinated - whether the dog has been vaccinated
      adopterId - the ID of the adopter, or null if not adopted
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter, or null if unassigned
      size - the dog's size classification; must not be null
      neutered - whether the dog has been neutered
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if size is null or any Animal parameter is invalid

    • Dog

      public Dog(String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, boolean vaccinated, Dog.Size size, boolean neutered)
      Constructs a new Dog with the given attributes. All parameters are required and validated at construction time.
      Parameters:
      name - the dog's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the dog's breed; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the dog's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the dog's activity level; must not be null
      vaccinated - whether the dog has been vaccinated
      size - the dog's size classification; must not be null
      neutered - whether the dog has been neutered
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if size is null or any Animal parameter is invalid

    • Dog

      public Dog(Dog other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new Dog with all field values copied from other. Inherits base Animal fields via Animal(Animal) and copies Dog-specific fields.
      Parameters:
      other - the Dog instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getSpecies

      public Species getSpecies()
      Returns the species of this animal. Each concrete subclass must return its own immutable Species constant.
      Specified by:
      getSpecies in class Animal
      Returns:
      the Species of this animal

    • getSize

      public Dog.Size getSize()
      Returns the size classification of this dog.
      Returns:
      the dog's Dog.Size

    • isNeutered

      public boolean isNeutered()
      Returns whether this dog has been neutered.
      Returns:
      true if the dog is neutered, false otherwise

    • setNeutered

      public void setNeutered(boolean neutered)
      Updates the neutered status of this dog. Typically called when shelter medical records are updated after a procedure.
      Parameters:
      neutered - the new neutered status
